Georgian National University SEU, Georgia

Atlas Mentor specializes in guiding students through their MBBS study abroad journey, particularly at Georgian National University SEU, Georgia ensuring personalized and comprehensive support throughout the application and enrollment process.

  • By Altas Mentor
  • University In Georgia
  • July 15, 2024
  • Home

  • Georgian National University SEU, Georgia
# Georgia

Georgian National University SEU

Georgian National University SEU was established in 2001 and is located on Tsinandali Street in Tbilisi, Georgia. It offers medical education to international students and is known for using innovative teaching methods. The university is approved by organizations such as the World Health Organization (WHO) and the Medical Council of India (MCI), ensuring that its medical degrees are globally recognized.

The MBBS program at SEU lasts six years and is considered budget-friendly. Every year, many students apply to study MBBS here, and currently, over 10,000 students are enrolled in the program. After completing their MBBS, students are eligible to practice in India.

Georgia has become a popular destination for Indian students pursuing MBBS due to the absence of entrance exams and the recognition by the MCI. SEU offers various courses in English, attracting students from all over the world, including those seeking undergraduate, graduate, and doctoral degrees.

The mission of SEU is to create a modern university environment that helps students realize their potential, provides contemporary knowledge within the Georgian education system, and promotes national awareness in building a civic society.

Why Choose Georgian National University SEU?

Georgian National University SEU, the largest privately run educational institution in Georgia, offers several compelling reasons for medical students to choose it for their MBBS studies. Here are the major highlights:

  • SEU is one of the most popular universities in Georgia and internationally.
  • It holds an attractive ranking within the country, drawing numerous students each year.
  • The admission process for MBBS is simple and requires minimal documentation for foreign students.
  • The annual tuition fee for medical courses is approximately USD 5,500, making it budget-friendly for international students.
  • SEU focuses on providing high-quality education with modern technology and experienced faculty.
  • Practical knowledge is emphasized to enhance medical skills.
  • SEU is recognized by various prestigious organizations including WHO (World Health Organization) and MCI (Medical Council of India).
  • Studying MBBS in Georgia is more affordable compared to many other countries.
  • Graduates can pursue specialization, postgraduate opportunities, and residency programs in Georgia and other countries.
  • SEU is known for its high academic standards and quality education.
  • The university has a highly engaged team with expertise in multiple fields.
  • SEU boasts state-of-the-art facilities and modern infrastructure to support medical education.

Eligibility Criteria of Georgian National University SEU

Applicants interested in studying at Georgian National University SEU must meet the following eligibility criteria:

  • Exam: Students must be NEET qualified.
  • Academics:
    • 50% marks in 12th grade with science subjects (Physics, Biology, and Chemistry).
    • 40% marks in 12th grade for reserved category students.
  • Age: Minimum age of 17 years. Students who turn 17 by December 31st of the admission year are also eligible

Documentation Required for Admission at Georgian National University SEU

To secure admission at Georgian National University SEU, applicants must provide a set of essential documents. These documents are crucial for verifying the eligibility and background of each student.

  • 10th Mark Sheet: Proof of secondary education completion.
  • 12th Mark Sheet: Proof of higher secondary education completion.
  • Original Passport: Valid identification and travel document.
  • Passport Size Photograph: Recent photographs for identification purposes.
  • Medical Report: General health assessment.
  • NEET UG Scorecard: Proof of qualifying the NEET exam.
  • HIV/AIDS Reports: Health clearance related to HIV/AIDS.
  • Covid-19 Report Card: Proof of Covid-19 health status.

Georgian National University SEU Ranking

Georgian National University SEU has achieved notable rankings both nationally and globally, influencing many students’ decisions to choose it for their education. The university is ranked 13th in the country and holds the 8,377th position worldwide according to 4ICU rankings.

Hostel and Facilities at Georgian National University

Georgian National University offers excellent hostel facilities for international MBBS students, ensuring a comfortable stay with comprehensive amenities:

  • Fully Furnished Rooms: Comfortable and well-equipped living spaces.
  • Reading Hall: Quiet space for study and research.
  • Labs: Modern laboratories for practical learning.
  • AC Rooms: Air-conditioned accommodations for comfort.
  • Auditorium: Venue for academic and cultural events.
  • GYM: Fitness facilities for physical well-being.
  • Library: Access to a vast collection of academic resources.
  • High Security: Ensures safety and peace of mind for all residents.

Hostel and Facilities at Georgian National University

Student life at Georgian National University SEU is vibrant and enriching, with a focus on both academic excellence and holistic development:

  • Active and Busy Environment: The university supports diverse student initiatives, projects, sports, and creative activities.
  • Cultural and Educational Events: Regular events provide opportunities for students to showcase their talents and skills.
  • Perfect Atmosphere: SEU offers an ideal setting where students can fully experience the charm of university life.
  • Sports Facilities: Well-equipped indoor and outdoor sports fields promote a healthy lifestyle with activities like table tennis, badminton, and basketball.
  • Art and Culture: Emphasis on art and cultural activities enhances the overall student experience, fostering creativity and exploration.
